case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. TDH TRANSPORT LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100199148) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TDH TRANSPORT LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-01-2023
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100199148) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100213242), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED AUG-29-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-30-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT TDH TRANSPORT LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585(D) AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100224330) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION RE: ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717 (TRANSACTION ID # 100224330) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100199148) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100216588) AS TO DEFENDANT TDH TRANSPORT LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100224330) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE PENDING AS TO JUDGE MICHELLE TONG (TRANSACTION ID # 100201264) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $735.79 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100224330) AS TO DEFENDANT TDH TRANSPORT LLC
DECLARATION OF ERC J. JUN RE METHOD OF CALCULATING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100224330) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TDH TRANSPORT LLC $14,525.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,973.80 INTEREST, $735.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,034.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
